title: Service Restart With Missing Log Path
headline: Graceful handling when one evidence source is missing.
description: Runs a workflow with one invalid log path and one valid service-restart log so the console can show that SentinelOps records safe tool failures without crashing the whole investigation.

request_body.prompt: Investigate the service restart incident and keep going even if one evidence file is missing.

notes: Use the tool results panel to point out the safe failure instead of expecting it in top-level citations.
This incident is ideal for discussing resilience and graceful degradation.

operator_steps: Run the workflow and inspect the tool results panel.
Point out that one log read failed safely while the workflow still completed.
Use the final report to explain fallback behavior under partial evidence.
